assertions.evidence_with: 4 sequential awaits replaced with `Promise.all`
assertions.evidence_without: Parallelize all independent queries ... await Promise.all([...])

assertions.evidence_with: Not mentioned -- uses Promise.all but does not discuss starting promises early and awaiting late
assertions.evidence_without: Not mentioned -- uses Promise.all but does not discuss start-early-await-late pattern

assertions.evidence_with: Analytics moved to `after()` callback ... after(() => { analytics.track(...) })
assertions.evidence_without: Fire-and-forget analytics (non-blocking) ... Intentionally not awaited -- analytics must never block the response

assertions.evidence_with: Cache check moved before DB queries ... Check cache FIRST -- skip all work if hit
assertions.evidence_without: Cache check moved before DB queries ... Eliminates all DB/network cost on cache hit

assertions.evidence_with: No mention of React.cache() or per-request dedup
assertions.evidence_without: No mention of React.cache() or per-request dedup

assertions.evidence_with: const PDFExporter = dynamic(() => import('@/components/PDFExporter')...) ... const AIAssistant = dynamic(() => import('@/components/AIAssistant')...)
assertions.evidence_without: const PDFExporter = lazy(() => import('@/components/PDFExporter')...) ... Conditionally import() only when the feature flag is active

assertions.evidence_with: Script strategy='lazyOnload' ... Defer non-essential third-party scripts
assertions.evidence_without: strategy='lazyOnload' for both ... Defer non-critical scripts

assertions.evidence_with: AIAssistant conditionally loaded only when feature flag active ... {aiEnabled ? <AIAssistant /> : null}
assertions.evidence_without: LazyAIAssistant ... if (!isEnabled) return null ... conditionally import() only when the feature flag is active

assertions.evidence_with: Barrel files (index.ts) defeat tree-shaking ... Split barrel @/components/ui into direct imports
assertions.evidence_without: Barrel re-exports (index.ts) defeat tree-shaking ... Use direct path imports (@/components/ui/Button)

assertions.evidence_with: No mention of preloading on hover or focus
assertions.evidence_without: No mention of preloading on hover or focus

assertions.evidence_with: Derived during render -- no effect, no extra state, no wasted render cycle
assertions.evidence_without: Derived State Stored in useState (Critical) ... Replace with useMemo. Derived data should be computed, not synchronized

assertions.evidence_with: greeting is a string concatenation -- zero cost ... count is .length -- a property access ... Remove both useMemo calls; inline
assertions.evidence_without: Pointless useMemo Wrappers ... greeting: string concatenation is trivially cheap ... count: .length is O(1) ... Remove both useMemo calls; inline the expressions

assertions.evidence_with: Hoisted outside component -- stable reference ... const DEFAULT_STYLE moved to module scope
assertions.evidence_without: Object Literal Created Every Render Defeats React.memo ... Move the constant outside the component ... const CARD_STYLE at module level

assertions.evidence_with: Removed windowWidth entirely (unused state) -- did not demonstrate initializer function pattern
assertions.evidence_without: useState(() => typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.innerWidth : 0) -- lazy initializer with typeof guard

assertions.evidence_with: Missing resize listener cleanup ... Removed entirely (unused)
assertions.evidence_without: Memory Leak: Missing Cleanup in Resize Listener ... return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', handler)

assertions.evidence_with: isAdmin never toggled ... Moved to prop ... should come from outside
assertions.evidence_without: Unused State: isAdmin ... never set to true ... should come from props or context

assertions.evidence_with: No mention of using primitive values as deps
assertions.evidence_without: No mention of using primitive values as deps

assertions.evidence_with: {isAdmin ? <AdminPanel users={users} /> : null} ... Use ternary operator, not && for conditional rendering
assertions.evidence_without: {isAdmin && <AdminPanel users={users} />} -- still uses && pattern, not changed to ternary

assertions.evidence_with: setSortDirection(prev => prev === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc')
assertions.evidence_without: setSortDirection((prev) => (prev === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc'))

assertions.evidence_with: cookies(), headers() make the entire route dynamic. One call in a layout makes ALL child pages dynamic. The cookies() call already makes this dynamic
assertions.evidence_without: Does not flag cookies() as making the route dynamic -- mentions unused headers import but not the dynamic route implication of cookies()

assertions.evidence_with: 3 sequential awaits = total time is sum of all three ... Parallelized in each Suspense section
assertions.evidence_without: Sequential Data Fetching ... Use Promise.all for parallel fetching

assertions.evidence_with: Oversized serialization boundary -- too much data passed to client component ... Minimize data passed from server to client components
assertions.evidence_without: Unnecessary Client Component Boundary ... entire dataset is serialized into the RSC payload

assertions.evidence_with: categories is passed to both Sidebar and ProductList (duplicate serialization) ... Avoid duplicate serialization in RSC props
assertions.evidence_without: Does not explicitly flag categories being passed to both components as duplicate serialization

assertions.evidence_with: No authentication or authorization check before creating the order ... Added auth() check
assertions.evidence_without: No Input Validation on Server Action ... Prices must come from the database ... Moved to actions.ts with 'use server' ... no auth check mentioned but input validation and security addressed

assertions.evidence_with: Use Suspense boundaries to stream content progressively ... <Suspense fallback=...>
assertions.evidence_without: Suspense boundaries ... sidebar and product list load independently, streaming to the client

assertions.evidence_with: Use refs for transient high-frequency values ... ref + direct DOM mutation in isolated TrackedCursor
assertions.evidence_without: Extracted TrackedCursor with its own state -- still uses useState for mousePos, not useRef

assertions.evidence_with: Combine chained filter/map/reduce into single loop ... Single for loop
assertions.evidence_without: Still uses filter then sort pattern, does not combine into single loop

assertions.evidence_with: Use loop for min/max instead of sort()[0] ... Single-pass max tracking
assertions.evidence_without: Single-pass O(n) ... replaced 8x iteration + sorts with one loop via Map ... tracks maxEvent in single pass

assertions.evidence_with: Hoist RegExp creation outside loops ... Module-level EMAIL_REGEX
assertions.evidence_without: Regex created on every render mentioned as issue #7 but removed validEmails as dead code rather than hoisting regex

assertions.evidence_with: Use Set for O(1) dedup ... [...new Set(events.map(e => e.type))]
assertions.evidence_without: Removed validEmails and uniqueTypes as dead code -- did not demonstrate Set usage

assertions.evidence_with: typeBreakdown uses explicit loop with array of hardcoded types, not a Map index
assertions.evidence_without: Map-based O(1) lookup ... const map = new Map<string, { count: number; maxEvent: ... }>()

assertions.evidence_with: Cache localStorage reads ... useState(readDarkMode) initializer
assertions.evidence_without: useRef for localStorage read ... Read once on mount instead of every render

assertions.evidence_with: Hoist static JSX outside component functions ... const STATIC_HEADER = <header>...
assertions.evidence_without: memo on StaticHeader ... Constant props -- never needs to re-render

assertions.evidence_with: No mention of content-visibility: auto
assertions.evidence_without: No mention of content-visibility: auto

assertions.evidence_with: The comment says 'This runs like componentDidMount' but the skill explicitly warns: useEffect with an empty dep array [] is NOT componentDidMount. It runs after paint, not before.
assertions.evidence_without: Does not flag the 'runs like componentDidMount' comment as incorrect -- focuses on hydration mismatch but not the componentDidMount misconception

assertions.evidence_with: useMemo/useCallback for every value is premature optimization ... hasUnread and bellColor are single boolean/ternary checks -- Remove
assertions.evidence_without: Over-memoization of trivial derivations ... hasUnread and bellColor ... memoization cost exceeds the computation they save

assertions.evidence_with: State updates in React 18+ are auto-batched everywhere ... Don't wrap in flushSync unless you specifically need synchronous rendering
assertions.evidence_without: flushSync forces a synchronous re-render, bypassing React's batching ... already works with normal React 18 batching

assertions.evidence_with: cookies(), headers() make the entire route dynamic. One call in a layout makes ALL child pages dynamic. Calling cookies() in app/layout.tsx means every single page becomes dynamically rendered.
assertions.evidence_without: Does not flag cookies() in layout as making all pages dynamic -- says 'The cookies() usage with await is correct for Next.js 15+' and marks it as 'OTHERWISE CORRECT'

assertions.evidence_with: Prefer useTransition over manual loading state booleans
assertions.evidence_without: Does not mention useTransition for the refresh loading pattern

assertions.evidence_with: stale-closure race condition ... Use an AbortController for cleanup
assertions.evidence_without: classic React async effect race condition ... Use an ignore flag (or AbortController) in the effect cleanup

assertions.evidence_with: Hydration flicker ... user sees it, then the effect runs and switches to the saved theme -- causing a visible flash of wrong theme (FOUC)
assertions.evidence_without: A visible flash of wrong theme (FOIT/FOUC) ... A React hydration mismatch warning
